prompt: Please create a fictional VTuber using the character in the image. Name: 'name', Motif: 'motif', a VTuber streaming screen based on 'favorite color' with a 'favorite atmosphere'. Place the character in the center, a comment section on the right, a VTuber logo based on the character's motif in the top right, 'Chat Stream' text in the top left, and a character profile (type, age, likes, skills, catchphrase) in the bottom left. Place the time in the top center. Image size: 16:9.
